goals: Explore available unit conversion categories to understand tool capabilities
List available units in the data category for digital storage conversions
Convert data storage units relevant to AI model size analysis
List available units in the time category for latency/timing conversions
Convert time units for performance measurement analysis

user_agent_config.personality: Methodical and detail-oriented, prefers structured exploration before diving into specific tasks. Curious about tool capabilities before applying them.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands AI system vulnerabilities and cybersecurity concepts but has limited knowledge of unit conversion tools. Does not know specific tool names or APIs. Needs to discover available conversion options for research measurements.

end_condition: The user has explored available conversion categories, identified relevant units for data and time conversions, and completed the necessary unit conversions for their AI cybersecurity research analysis.
